name: Exotic Plum Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine plums, peaches, and 1 cup water in a saucepan over moderate heat.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Add sugar, corn syrup, and remaining water; stir until the sugar and corn syrup dissolve.
4. Stir in garlic, ginger, salt, and chiles; bring to a boil again.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 45-60 minutes, stirring often.
6. Transfer to a food processor and process until smooth.
7. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve, pressing down with the back of a spoon to extract all liquid.
8. Return strained puree to a saucepan; bring to a boil over medium heat.
9. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
10. Pour into sterile jars, wipe rims clean, secure lids.
11. Process half-pint jars in boiling water for 10 minutes.
12. Allow to cool completely before storing in a cool, dry, dark place.
13. Serve at room temperature.
